name: BR Malls Participacoes S.A.
summary: BR Malls Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. operates and manages shopping malls in Brazil. It also promotes and manages real estate enterprises; manages parking lot operations; and offers digital solutions to support shopping malls and retail companies. It owns a portfolio of 31 malls. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
